violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Several TCS items, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Garlic butter was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC added water and retested. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Inspector observed several items cooling in containers greater than four inches deep in the 2 door lowboy. PIC discarded items. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026

Main dishwasher located in the dish area was not in good repair. Per interview with PIC, dishwasher was taken out of service due to sanitizer tube being clogged. PIC has work order in place. Establishment is using 3 bay sink and bar dishwasher for washing/sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order AND the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as sauces) in the lowboy refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated eggs. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (peeler and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed peeler and took ice machine out of service to be washed/sanitized. PIC discarded ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use 3 bay sink to sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Vodka sauce, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. PIC added * next to raw items during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Inspector observed vodka sauce cooling in the prep unit from the night before in a container greater than four inches deep. PIC disposed of sauce. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat AND chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink and main dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026
Bar dishwasher lacked cleaning detergent. Establishment to wash via 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026
The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area is in poor repair (previous water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
